records.m_Talk_FRA: Tout le monde a 959t959 emball959 par l'arriv959e de la Compteuse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not only is she a minor, but she was made a Major as soon as she was hired. Obviously she's attracted a lot of attention.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sie ist nicht nur minderj95thrig, sondern wurde gleich nach ihrer Einstellung zum Major ernannt, was nat9588rlich viel Aufmerksamkeit auf sich zog.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Non seulement elle est mineure, mais en plus, elle a 959t959 nomm959e major d958s son arriv959e. Alors forc959ment, elle a 959t959 l'attraction du moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So everyone asked her all sorts of questions, like what school she attended and why she decided to join the force.

Die Leute stellten ihr alle m9582glichen Fragen94p
8g welche Schule sie besucht hatte, warum sie sich f9588r die Polizei entschieden hatte, und so weiter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But then her first response was...

records.m_Talk_FRA: Mais pour toute r959ponse, elle a dit...

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>If you've got the time and energy to pry about my personal life, just go catch up on your investigations. You incompetents!</color>

8n</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's what she said.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Das sagte sie, wortw9582rtlich.
records.m_Talk_FRA: C'est ce qu'elle a dit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Such a harsh response obviously made things awkward.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eine solch harsche Reaktion machte die Sache nat9588rlich unangenehm.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Forc959ment, 95wa a jet959 un froid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't imagine having to deal with such a cocky young Counter.

records.m_Talk_FRA: 95]a ne doit pas 95xtre simple d'avoir affaire 95p une jeune Compteuse aussi arrogante.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I thought poor Soyoung must have her hands full.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ich dachte, die arme Soyoung w95tre vielleicht davon 9588berfordert.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Je pensais que Soyoung serait d959pass959e.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it turns out I was getting worried for nothing.
records.m_Talk_VTN:
Nh98~ng h959a ra t9580i 96e95s lo l86}ng h95so huy87
9n.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In fact, the Major's the one getting bossed around by Soyoung.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Denn tats95tchlich ist es Soyoung, die die junge Majorin herumkommandiert.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Au final, c'est le major qui se retrouve supervis959e par Soyoung.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, at a glance it may appear like Soyoung is being all subservient to the little Major...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But that couldn't be farther from the truth.

records.m_Talk_ENG: One time, Soyoung said, <color=#ffd34c>"You probably don't know how to do this since you're a novice cop, right ma'am?"</color> to the Major.

8n</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: This got the Major so furious that she spent the next three nights studying regulations.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Das machte die Majorin derart w9588tend, dass sie die n95tchsten drei N95tchte mit dem Studium der Vorschriften verbrachte.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Elle 959tait si folle de rage qu'elle a pass959 les trois nuits suivantes 95p 959tudier les lois.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Major doesn't even blink at compliments or encouragements. Who knew anyone could influence her like that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Die Majorin blinzelt sonst nicht einmal, wenn sie Komplimente oder Ermutigungen kriegt. Wer h95ttte gedacht, dass jemand sie so beeinflussen k9582nnte?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Les compliments et les encouragements la laissent de marbre. Qui aurait pu croire qu'on puisse l'influencer de la sorte94p?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Soyoung makes it look as easy as using a laser pointer to make a kitten jump around.
records.m_Talk_VTN: Soyoung l95pm m87ai vi87]c d87[ d95png nh98~ ch98qi v87mi m958o con b86ng c95ry 96e87g ch98qi m958o v86{y.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, but that doesn't mean Soyoung's only taking advantage of her naive boss.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, mais n'allez pas croire que Soyoung abuse de sa na95}vet959.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In fact, no one cares about the Major more than Soyoung.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'd end up with a lot more criminals in the morgue than jail.
